title: Infrastructure Specialist/Edge Specialist
description:
The Edge Specialist plays a key role in deploying, and managing scalable and secure infrastructure solutions, ensuring seamless integration across on-premises, cloud, and hybrid environments.

Key Responsibilities

Implement, Tune and maintain RHEL/Windows systems for performance and uptime.

Implement and manage integration of peripheral with backend systems.

Troubleshoot and resolve device/system issues promptly.

Communicate effectively with technical and non-technical stakeholders.

Analyse change requests and recommend architectural improvements.

Requirements

Preferably bachelor’s degree in computer science, Engineering, or related field.

Strong hands-on experience with RHEL and Windows Server in high-availability environments.

Familiarity with networking basics, firewalls, and load balancers.

Strong Knowledge of backup & restoration, virtualization (VMware/Nutanix/Hyper-V), and basic cloud concepts.

Experience integrating and troubleshooting peripheral devices.

Strong understanding of system security best practices, compliance hardening, and PKI (Public Key Infrastructure) for secure communications and certificate management.

Good communication skills for working with vendors and stakeholders.

postedCompany.description:
In a world of increasing connectivity and digital interactions, safeguarding identity and payment credentials has become that much more challenging. This is especially relevant in Asia with unique virtual and physical cultural interactions. Based in Singapore with a strong regional focus in Asia, TOPPAN NEXT TECH brings together three of our innovative business units to deliver end-to-end digital & print for enterprise security & identity needs.


For over 30 years, we’ve partnered with clients facing ongoing security risks to safeguard their operations and reputation in cost-effective ways to process and manage business documents. We’re trusted by governments and financial institutions to produce advanced secure documents for them.


Our security print services include passports, visa labels, certificates, confidential documents, cheques, vouchers, custom & excise stamps, tax revenue stamps, savings books, lottery tickets and machine-readable betting slips. We also offer design and consultancy services (including counterfeit analysis) with constant research into the latest tracking and tracing technologies.


Our publication services include, design, pre-press, high-quality printing, binding, packaging, shipping, logistical support and final distribution.


Our digital print services include data printing, mailing and fulfilment, electronic archiving, image management solutions, database design and management, and data capture and processing.
postedCompany.name: Toppan Next Tech PTE. LTD.
